meta.title: Anchor - Your Anxiety Buddy | Immediate Panic Attack Relief
meta.description: Free anxiety relief app with 7-step panic de-escalation, 24/7 AI support, and privacy-first design. Download for iOS and Android.
meta.privacyDescription: Learn how Anchor protects your privacy. We auto-delete voice recordings after 7 days, never sell your data, and give you full control over your information.
meta.termsDescription: Terms of Service for Anchor app. Important mental health disclaimers, acceptable use policy, and user rights.
meta.inviteDescription: Download Anchor for immediate relief during panic attacks. Available on iOS and Android.

hero.headline: Anchor yourself in the storm
hero.subheadline: Immediate relief during panic attacks. Evidence-based. Private. Always there.

features.title: Features designed for the acute moment

sos.title: 7-Step Panic Relief
sos.description: Clinically-informed de-escalation in 2-3 minutes. Multi-sensory grounding: sight, touch, sound, breath.

aiChat.title: 24/7 AI Support
aiChat.description: CBT and ACT-based therapeutic conversations. Crisis detection with immediate resources.

voice.title: Speak, Don't Type
voice.description: Voice messages when typing feels impossible. Lower cognitive load during panic episodes.

privacy.title: Your Data, Your Control
privacy.description: 7-day audio auto-deletion. Export or delete anytime. We never sell your information.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: From panic to calm in 2-3 minutes. A guided journey back to yourself.

philosophy.title: Not another wellness app
philosophy.subtitle: Anchor is different by design

darkByDesign.title: Dark by Design
darkByDesign.description: No toxic positivity. A calming void, not overwhelming brightness.

evidenceBased.title: Evidence-Based
evidenceBased.description: Built on CBT, ACT, and somatic grounding techniques.

immediateRelief.title: Immediate Relief
immediateRelief.description: For the acute moment, not daily meditation practice.

therapeuticTouch.title: Therapeutic Touch
therapeuticTouch.description: Haptic feedback as a grounding tool, not just UI.

philosophy.quote: When you're drowning in panic, you don't need motivation. You need an anchor.

privacyHighlight.title: Your Safe Space
privacyHighlight.subtitle: Your mental health data is sacred. We built Anchor with privacy at its core, not as an afterthought.
privacyHighlight.cardSubtitle: Export or delete your data anytime. No questions asked.

cta.title: Ready to anchor yourself?
cta.subtitle: Download free. No subscription required.
cta.subtitleHighlight: Start your journey to calm today.

footer.description: Immediate relief during panic attacks. Evidence-based. Private. Always there.
footer.crisisBannerText: If you're having thoughts of suicide or self-harm, please reach out immediately:
footer.disclaimer: Anchor is not a substitute for professional mental health care. If you are in crisis, please contact emergency services or a mental health professional.
